content.speakerText: Thanks a million for helping me move this couch!
content.speakerTextCn: 太感谢你帮我搬沙发了！
expectedAnswers: No big deal — I love helping you out.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否恰当回应了对方的感谢
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合朋友间非正式对话的语气
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景核心表达如 'don't mention it', 'anytime', 'no big deal'

content.speakerText: I'd never have gotten it done without you!
content.speakerTextCn: 没你我真搬不动这沙发！
expectedAnswers: Happy to help! Seriously, anytime you need me.
It was nothing — I'm just glad I could help.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否认可对方的强调并给予积极回应
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当的表达如 'lifesaver', 'anytime'
表达自然度：语气是否真诚、口语化，不生硬
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景核心表达如 'lifesaver', 'anytime', 'glad I could help'

content.speakerText: I really appreciate you helping me carry all these boxes — it was so heavy!
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你帮我搬这些箱子，太重了！
expectedAnswers: No problem! I'm happy to lend a hand.
Anytime! I know how tough moving can be.
Don't worry about it — I've been there before!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了对方的感谢和困难描述
语言准确性：语法和词汇是否正确，是否避免负面表达
表达自然度：是否使用自然的口语表达，如 'lend a hand', 'been there'
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景相关表达如 'no problem', 'anytime', 'lend a hand'
